description: A composite image. The background is a daytime exterior photograph of a tall multi-story concrete building with a fenced vehicle entrance and a paved approach under a clear blue sky. Centered in the upper left is an inset frontal booking-style portrait of an adult man with dark hair, a beard and dark-framed glasses, wearing a dark green top against a plain wall. A banner across the bottom carries a circular ICE seal and the text ICE.gov/NEWSROOM.
